title: Jitter multicast DIS and suppress DIO
description: Use bounded node-differentiated Trickle jitter for multicast DIS and distinguish accepted-consistent, accepted-inconsistent, and rejected DIOs so only valid consistent DIOs increment redundancy.
acceptance_criteria: Multiple nodes schedule different bounded multicast-DIS transmit times; accepted consistent DIO suppresses by k; rejected DIO does not increment redundancy.
close_reason: Added deterministic bounded multicast-DIS jitter from local identity/source/time, typed DIO outcomes, and production trickle_consistent calls only for accepted-consistent DIOs. Multi-node distinct [Imin/2,Imin) schedule and k-suppression/rejected-no-increment tests pass; full node suite passes.
